title: Pilot Submit Buttons and Safe Output Panels Record
corrections: Star Reflection pilot-safe result panel added between input section and governance basis.
Panchang pilot-safe result panel added before existing Panchang output table.
Panchang existing output table can be updated with pilot-safe location/date basis.
Upcoming Observance is linked to selected basis but remains withheld until editorial verification.

placement_rules.star_reflection_output: Displayed between birth-place/coordinate input section and reflection-basis governance note.
placement_rules.panchang_output: Displayed before the existing Panchang table and safe values are reflected in the existing Panchang table where applicable.

output_boundary.star_reflection: Input acknowledgement and basis preview only; no prediction or assessment.
output_boundary.panchang: Location/date/basis preview only; exact Tithi/Nakshatra/Yoga/Paksha remain withheld.
output_boundary.upcoming_observance: Linked to selected basis but not publicly computed.
